reasoning: The control focuses on specifying objectives with clarity to identify and assess risks. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that access controls are enforced with least privilege (RBAC), audit logging is enabled for tracking and assessing actions, network policies are in place to restrict ingress traffic by default, and secrets are encrypted at rest to mitigate risks related to sensitive data exposure.
title: CC3.1 COSO Principle 6: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives
